sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Air Products sets Aug. 10 payout date for $1.81 dividend
feed.summary: Air Products (NYSE: APD) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.81 per share. The dividend will be paid on August 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 1, 2026. This announcement follows the Board of Directors' declaration on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Prologis Prices $1.25 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Prologis, L.P. has priced a $1.25 billion senior unsecured notes offering, split into $500 million due in 2031 and $750 million due in 2036. The net proceeds of approximately $1.2 billion are intended for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, to enhance the company's balance sheet and funding flexibility. An analyst has rated PLD stock as a Buy with a $150.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform due to strong financials, raised guidance, and positive technicals despite some valuation concerns.

feed.title: Sidus Space Advances its Fortis Next-Generation Command and Data Handling (C&DH) System
feed.summary: Sidus Space, Inc. announced advancements to its Fortis Command and Data Handling (C&DH) platform, a modular 3U OpenVPX system for space and defense missions. This system, developed in collaboration with Microchip Technology, leverages flight-proven technologies to reduce integration complexity and support rapid development and scalability. Fortis integrates radiation-tolerant processing and high-speed data interfaces, informed by insights from Sidus-designed LizzieSat missions.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FCX) Freeport-McMoRan Posts Q1 Revenue $6.23B, vs. FactSet Est of $5.73B
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has posted strong Q1 results, with revenue reaching $6.23 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $5.73 billion. The company also reported an adjusted EPS of $0.57, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $0.47. This positive performance is highlighted by several recent analyst price target increases and maintaining "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line posts Q1 results May 4, webcast at 8:30 a.m.
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) will report its First Quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 6:30 a.m. ET. A conference call and webcast to discuss these results will follow at 8:30 a.m. ET, accessible via the company's investor relations website, with a replay available for 30 days. The announcement highlights NCLH's current fleet of 35 ships with over 75,000 berths and plans to add 16 more ships by 2037, increasing capacity by approximately 43,000 berths.

feed.title: SpinLaunch Selects Equinix to Deploy Global Ground Infrastructure for Meridian Space Constellation
feed.summary: SpinLaunch has partnered with Equinix to deploy the ground infrastructure for its Meridian Space satellite constellation. This collaboration will leverage Equinix's global data center network to host SpinLaunch's compact teleports, addressing challenges associated with traditional Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite network deployments. The agreement aims to provide faster service, lower costs, and enhanced data security and sovereignty for enterprise, telecom, and government LEO satellite users by integrating satellite connectivity directly into existing digital infrastructures.

feed.title: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) Given New $255.00 Price Target at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has lowered its price target on Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) to $255.00 from $275.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of nearly 28%. This adjustment follows Capital One missing Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, alongside increased provisions for credit losses and a significant customer settlement. Despite mixed analyst views, the consensus on COF remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $259.30.

feed.title: Grainger Q1 dividend preview - 54 year streak set for another raise (GWW:NYSE)
feed.summary: Grainger (GWW) is anticipated to announce a dividend increase in April, which would extend its streak of regular dividend growth to 54 years. Analysts project a consensus annual dividend of approximately $9.59 per share, translating to about $2.397 per share quarterly. This expected increase is in line with the company's historical dividend trends.

feed.title: Masco Corporation (NYSE:MAS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Masco Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net sales up 6% and EPS growing 20% to $1.04, exceeding expectations. The company maintains its full-year 2026 EPS guidance of $4.10 to $4.30, anticipating sales to be up low single digits despite higher commodity costs and geopolitical uncertainties. Masco is streamlining its organization, implementing restructuring actions, and increasing its share repurchase target to at least $800 million.

feed.title: Suburban Propane (NYSE: SPH) declares $0.325 quarterly payout
feed.summary: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE: SPH) has declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.325 per common unit for the quarter ending March 28, 2026, equating to an annualized rate of $1.30 per common unit. The distribution is payable on May 12, 2026, to unitholders of record as of May 5, 2026. The company also noted that 100% of its distributions to foreign investors are considered income effectively connected with a U.S. trade or business, subject to the highest applicable federal income tax withholding rate.

feed.title: GE Vernova Inc. $GEV is Schear Investment Advisers LLC's 5th Largest Position
feed.summary: Schear Investment Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE: GEV) in Q4, making it their 5th largest holding valued at $8.29 million. This comes after GE Vernova reported a blockbuster Q1 earnings beat, with EPS of $17.44 versus $1.95 expected, and raised its annual revenue outlook, citing surging data-center and AI orders. Analysts have reacted positively, lifting price targets and maintaining a consensus "Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Given New $15.00 Price Target at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) from $17.00 to $15.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, suggesting a modest upside of 3.56% from its previous close. This aligns with a generally weak analyst consensus, with an average target of $15.80 and a "Reduce" rating overall. Despite this, two company directors recently purchased additional shares of CAG, which is currently trading near its 12-month low.

feed.title: Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) Releases FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) has updated its FY 2026 earnings guidance, raising EPS to 21.800–22.050, exceeding the consensus estimate of 21.370. The company also announced Q2 2026 EPS guidance of 5.25–5.30. Despite a recent target cut by Mizuho, analysts maintain an average "Hold" rating with an average price target of $476.60, as the company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, reported strong revenue, and declared a $0.91 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Dominion Energy (D) Gets a Hold from BMO Capital
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst James Thalacker maintained a Hold rating on Dominion Energy (D) with a price target of $67.00. This follows similar Hold ratings from Morgan Stanley, while Wells Fargo maintained a Buy rating. Dominion Energy recently reported quarterly revenue of $4.09 billion and a net profit of $586 million for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: Does Howmet Aerospace's New Top Lawyer Reframe Its Risk Profile and Profit Story for Investors (HWM)?
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace recently appointed Jonathan Arena as EVP, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer, a move that could reinforce governance and risk oversight for investors. This appointment comes as the company anticipates strong first-quarter earnings and higher financial commitments due to the planned acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing. Investors are assessing how increased leverage and integration risks balance against the potential for strengthened long-term aerospace content and revenue growth, and how Arena's role might influence analyst concerns regarding margin risks from headcount and capital spending.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty & Google Introduce Gemini-Enabled Shopping Experiences
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty and Google have partnered to introduce new AI-powered shopping experiences, leveraging Gemini Enterprise to offer more seamless, personalized, and intuitive beauty discovery. These innovations include agentic commerce within Google's AI Mode in Search and the Gemini app, allowing for product recommendations, comparisons, and direct checkout. Additionally, Ulta Beauty is launching Ulta AI on its website and app, an AI shopping assistant providing personalized guidance to customers.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific announced strong first quarter 2026 results, with revenue growing 6% to $11.01 billion and adjusted diluted EPS increasing 6% to $5.44. The company highlighted its growth strategy through innovative product launches, strategic collaborations with NVIDIA and SHL Medical, and successful capital deployment including the acquisition of Clario and a 10% dividend increase. Management expressed confidence in delivering a strong year, emphasizing operational excellence and customer success.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) After Its 42% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has seen a significant rally, with its stock closing at US$297.45 after a 42.3% increase over the last year. This article evaluates CBOE's current valuation using two methods: Excess Returns Analysis and Price vs. Earnings (P/E) ratio. While Excess Returns suggests CBOE is "about right" or slightly overvalued by 6.0%, its P/E of 28.46x is higher than Simply Wall St’s Fair Ratio of 13.76x, indicating it is "overvalued" by this metric.

feed.title: Chubb (CB) Q1 Combined Ratio Of 84% Tests Bullish Underwriting Narrative
feed.summary: Chubb (CB) reported a Q1 2026 combined ratio of 84%, with total revenue of US$14.8 billion and basic EPS of US$5.88. While the underwriting profitability remains tight, supporting a bullish view, analyst forecasts indicate a decline in revenue and earnings over the next three years, challenging the long-term bullish narrative. The company's valuation also presents mixed signals, trading above peer averages but below the industry average and its DCF fair value.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Ohio utilities to file three-year rate plan by May 22
feed.summary: FirstEnergy's Ohio utilities (The Illuminating Company, Ohio Edison, and Toledo Edison) plan to file their first three-year rate plan with the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio by May 22. This comes after new Ohio legislation allowing electric utilities to set distribution rates using forward-looking three-year plans. The proposed plan includes an average of $800 million annually for infrastructure upgrades and $83 million for tree trimming, potentially leading to average annual bill increases of 2.2% to 2.8% for typical residential customers.

feed.title: CDW appoints Hang Tan as chief strategy and transformation officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: CDW Corporation has announced the appointment of Hang Tan as its Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer, effective April 27, 2026. Tan, with over 20 years of experience from Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Bain & Company, will oversee enterprise strategy, transformation, and corporate development. This appointment comes as CDW, a Fortune 500 company, maintains a "GOOD" financial health rating and reported strong Q4 2025 earnings.

feed.title: Atrium Therapeutics earns $15M from Bristol Myers Squibb By Investing.com
feed.summary: Atrium Therapeutics received a $15 million development milestone payment from Bristol Myers Squibb for delivering a development candidate for an RNA-based therapy targeting a cardiology indication. This payment is part of a global licensing and research agreement that could see Atrium receive up to $1.35 billion in R&D milestone payments, $825 million in commercial milestone payments, and tiered royalties. Bristol Myers Squibb will fund all future clinical development, regulatory, and commercialization activities under the collaboration, which focuses on RNA-based therapies for cardiovascular conditions.

feed.title: BMO Capital Keeps Their Hold Rating on DTE Energy (DTE)
feed.summary: BMO Capital maintained a Hold rating on DTE Energy (DTE) with a price target of $152.00, according to analyst James Thalacker. Other analysts, including Michael Lonegan from Barclays, also recommend a Hold, while Morgan Stanley reiterated a Buy rating. The company recently reported Q4 revenues of $4.24 billion and a net profit of $372 million, showing growth from the previous year.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, surpassing expectations with an EPS of $2.83. The company achieved record quarterly revenues of $3.86 billion and pretax income of $735 million, attributing its success to a focus on financial professionals and client relationships. CEO Paul Shoukry highlighted robust recruiting, significant investments in technology and AI, and strong growth across Private Client Group, Capital Markets, Asset Management, and the bank segment, including a notable increase in securities-based lending.

feed.title: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. released its Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations. The company is undergoing a transformative year, focusing on becoming a stand-alone tower business by selling its small cell and fiber segments, preserving value from its DISH agreement through legal action, and improving operational efficiency. They reiterated full-year 2026 guidance, expecting 3.5% organic growth excluding Sprint cancellations and DISH terminations, with a focus on acquiring land under towers and investing in systems for efficiency.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation reported Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations at $0.89 versus $0.91, despite solid organic sales growth of 1% driven by a strong Service segment performance up 5%. The company announced a 5% increase in its quarterly dividend and completed $400 million in share repurchases, while addressing short-term profit pressures in its service business through targeted investments, pricing initiatives, and cost reduction programs. Otis anticipates sequential margin improvement and a return to year-over-year margin expansion by Q4 2026, maintaining its full-year EPS guidance of $4.20 to $4.24.

feed.title: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Boeing Company exceeded earnings expectations in Q1 2026, reporting an EPS of $-0.2 against an expectation of $-0.68493. The company saw strong performance across its Commercial Airplanes, Defense & Space, and Global Services segments, with consolidated revenue up 14% to $22.2 billion. Boeing remains on track with certification work for its 737-7, 737-10, and 777-9 programs, while also progressing with increased production rates and addressing supply chain challenges.

feed.title: Moody's Corp (MCO) PT Raised to $489 at BMO Capital
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Jeffrey Silber has raised the price target for Moody's Corp (MCO) to $489.00 from $463.00. This update was reported on April 23, 2026, at 8:10 AM EDT, indicating a positive outlook for the company's stock. The article is part of premium content on StreetInsider.com.

feed.title: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with adjusted diluted EPS up 13% to $4.33, surpassing expectations. Both its Ratings (MIS) and Analytics (MA) segments experienced 8% revenue growth, driven by sustained demand in areas like AI-driven infrastructure and private credit, and strategic partnerships for workflow integration. The company increased its full-year buyback guidance to $2.5 billion and remains confident in achieving its revenue and profitability targets despite geopolitical volatility.

feed.title: This Day in History: Coca-Cola debuts New Coke in 1985
feed.summary: On April 23, 1985, Coca-Cola introduced its new formula, New Coke, to the public. However, the product was quickly met with significant backlash, leading to its withdrawal from the market. This article briefly commemorates this historical event.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Ohio Units Implement Rate Hikes and New Three-Year Plan
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Ohio units began implementing monthly bill adjustments on March 1, 2026, to recover $245 million in storm restoration costs, which are spread over 25 years. Concurrently, FirstEnergy Ohio announced a Three-Year Rate Plan focusing on $800 million annually for grid upgrades and $83 million for vegetation management to enhance reliability and resilience. The plan aims for gradual rate changes, with annual reviews by the PUCO, while also providing support for vulnerable customers and encouraging industrial demand reduction.

feed.title: SEI Investments Company (NASDAQ:SEIC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: SEI Investments Company (NASDAQ:SEIC) reported a strong Q1 2026, with adjusted EPS increasing over 20% year-over-year, driven by top-line growth and margin expansion. The company saw exceptional net sales events, particularly from its Investment Manager Services, including significant deals with large alternative managers. SEI also highlighted progress in reimagining asset management, achieving enterprise excellence, boosting international returns, and strategically allocating capital, while addressing the positive impact and opportunities of AI across its businesses.

feed.title: Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE:SF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net revenues up 18% year-over-year to $1.48 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $1.45, exceeding expectations. The company highlighted broad-based growth across Global Wealth Management and Institutional businesses, driven by record asset management and investment banking revenues. Management discussed increasing AI integration for productivity, maintaining a conservative lending philosophy, and strategic approaches to market structure changes like stablecoin yield and tokenized equities, while expressing confidence in continued growth despite market uncertainties.

feed.title: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Lam Research Corporation reported strong Q3 2026 earnings, with revenues and profitability at the upper end and EPS exceeding their guidance ranges. The company highlighted record revenues, including a $2 billion quarter from its Customer Support Business Group, and raised its 2026 WFE outlook to $140 billion with an upside bias due to accelerating AI-driven semiconductor demand. Lam Research anticipates continued outperformance driven by increased deposition and etch intensity needed for AI-related technology inflections in NAND, DRAM, and foundry/logic, and expects significant growth in its advanced packaging solutions and Customer Support Business Group services.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation (NYSE:WAB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation (Wabtec) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with sales up 13% and adjusted EPS up 19% year-over-year, exceeding expectations due to operational strength and nonoperational benefits from currency and taxes. The company increased its adjusted EPS guidance for 2026, maintaining revenue guidance, reflecting confidence in its strong backlog, successful acquisitions like Dellner, and ongoing execution of its value creation framework. Despite mixed Freight market indicators and tariff headwinds, Wabtec is seeing robust international growth and leveraging technology differentiation to secure significant new orders and modernize its installed base.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Earns #1 Household Products Spot on Fortune's 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies List, Recognized for Superior Product Innovation
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (P&G) has been recognized by Fortune as the #1 company in the Household Products Industry on its 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies list, marking the third consecutive year P&G has held this distinction. The company was particularly lauded for its Product Innovation, reflecting its commitment to developing superior, science-backed solutions for consumers. This achievement is attributed to P&G's sustained investment across its brand portfolio and its integrated approach to innovation, leveraging science, technology, and AI.

feed.title: KEURIG DR PEPPER ($KDP) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: KEURIG DR PEPPER ($KDP) announced strong Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates for both earnings per share and revenue. The company reported $0.39 EPS on revenues of $3.976 billion, exceeding expectations. The article also details recent insider trading activity, with one sale by a Senior VP, and significant hedge fund movements, showing a mix of institutional additions and reductions in KDP shares.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Board Approves Common Stock Dividend
feed.summary: The Board of Directors of Howmet Aerospace Inc. has declared a dividend of 12 cents per share on the company's common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 8, 2026. Howmet Aerospace is a global provider of advanced engineered solutions for various industries, including aerospace, gas turbine, and transportation.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) reported a first-quarter profit of $881 million, or 61 cents per share, which adjusted to 57 cents per share for non-recurring gains. This performance surpassed Wall Street expectations, with revenue reaching $6.23 billion against an expected $5.61 billion. The results were generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Healthcare Companies: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG), Quest Diagnostics (DGX) and Merck & Company (MRK)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided new ratings for several healthcare companies. Truist Financial maintained a Buy rating for Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) with a Strong Buy consensus, while keeping a Hold rating for Quest Diagnostics (DGX). BMO Capital maintained a Buy rating for Merck & Company (MRK), which also holds a Moderate Buy consensus.

feed.title: American Cancer Society names Aflac 2025 Corporate Partner of the Year
feed.summary: The American Cancer Society has recognized Aflac as its 2025 Corporate Partner of the Year for its exceptional partnership in the fight against cancer. Aflac's initiatives include a multimillion-dollar commitment, leadership engagement, and the "Check for Cancer" movement, emphasizing awareness and utilization of cancer screenings. This recognition highlights Aflac's significant impact on cancer advocacy, research, and patient support.

feed.title: Boys & Girls Clubs of America Awarded $500,000 Opportunity Fund Grant from U.S. Bank Foundation
feed.summary: Boys & Girls Clubs of America has received a $500,000 multiyear grant from the U.S. Bank Foundation's Opportunity Fund. This funding will support the organization's Broadband Access and Virtual Work-Based Learning initiative, aiming to bridge gaps in digital access and workforce readiness for 6,000 youth, particularly in Native, rural, and military-connected communities. The initiative addresses community needs such as geographic isolation for military youth, inadequate broadband in some clubs, and limited access to career planning for many teens.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on General Mills: “A Lot of These Companies Just Have to Combine”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recently commented on General Mills (NYSE: GIS), suggesting that food companies need to combine to reaccelerate growth and play offense, especially given the current market climate. He explicitly stated he couldn't recommend General Mills stock, despite its 6.67% yield, due to its continued decline. Cramer believes that without consolidation, the food group may continue to struggle for years.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Applied Materials: “It’s Not a Good Buy, It’s a Great Buy”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer enthusiastically endorsed Applied Materials (NASDAQ: AMAT), calling it a "great buy" due to its crucial role in alleviating semiconductor shortages and its strong intellectual property. He ranked AMAT among top semiconductor capital equipment makers, emphasizing their importance, especially given memory shortages. However, the article notes that overall success for these companies might depend on the end of geopolitical conflicts.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Arista Networks: “A Personal Favorite of Mine”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) as an "amazing company" and a personal favorite, noting its strong performance with a 41% gain over three weeks. He attributed these rallies to the shift from copper-based to faster fiber optic networking solutions. Despite Cramer's positive remarks, Insider Monkey suggests that other AI stocks might offer even higher returns and quicker gains than ANET.

feed.title: 3 trends in employee benefits in 2026
feed.summary: New ADP research reveals that 83% of employees feel valued when offered benefits beyond medical. This article highlights three key trends shaping employee benefits in 2026: rising medical costs, employers as trusted anchors for certainty, and growing retirement anxiety. These trends emphasize the importance of financial health, well-being, and long-term protection for employees, significantly influencing their benefit preferences.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on AES Corporation: “It’s Incredibly Cheap, I Would Be a Buyer of It”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recently recommended The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) on Mad Money, calling it "incredibly cheap" and a buying opportunity, noting its historical unpopularity. Despite his positive outlook on AES, the article suggests that some AI stocks may offer higher and quicker returns, inviting readers to explore their top AI stock pick. Cramer previously highlighted AES in December 2025 in response to inquiries about data center demand.

feed.title: Apollo Funds to Acquire 40% Interest in Pembina Gas Infrastructure
feed.summary: Apollo-managed funds announced an agreement to acquire a 40% stake in Pembina Gas Infrastructure Inc. (PGI) from KKR. Pembina Pipeline Corporation will retain its 60% ownership and operational control. This transaction is expected to close by the end of the second quarter of 2026 and aims to support the continued growth of PGI, a leading gas processing platform in Western Canada.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace sets May 26 payout for 12-cent dividend
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE: HWM) has declared a common stock dividend of $0.12 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 26, 2026, to shareholders who are on record at the close of business on May 8, 2026. The company, headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, is a global provider of advanced engineered solutions primarily for the aerospace, gas turbine, and transportation industries.

feed.title: Copper producer Freeport posts quarterly results, webcast at 10 a.m. ET
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) has released its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results, making the press release available on its investor relations website. The company will host a conference call with securities analysts on April 23, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results, with a webcast and slides also available online. Freeport is a major copper producer with significant operations globally, including the Grasberg minerals district.
